## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run typecheck` and `npm run lint` pass
- [ ] `npm run build && npm run smoke` passes (sandbox, no account needed)
- [ ] New tools are read-only and set `readOnlyHint: true`
- [ ] No tokens/secrets in code, logs, or test fixtures
- [ ] README updated if behavior or setup changed

<!-- Heads-up: merging to main deploys and publishes a new Docker image. -->
